name: io.github.dcostenco/prism-mcp
description: Session memory, knowledge search, Brave Search, Gemini AI, and code transforms for AI agents

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key for web search tools

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key for AI-powered summarization and embeddings

environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Supabase project URL for session memory and knowledge persistence

environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Supabase service role key for database access

environmentVariables.name: PRISM_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: User ID for multi-tenant row-level security isolation (defaults to 'default')

environmentVariables.name: GCP_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google Cloud project ID for Vertex AI Discovery Engine integration

environmentVariables.name: VERTEX_DATA_STORE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Vertex AI Discovery Engine data store ID for enterprise search
